Hypothetical Prompt Embeddings (HyPE) is a technique that improves semantic retrieval by generating hypothetical questions for document chunks and embedding those questions to better align retrieval with user intent.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines retrieval of relevant documents with generation from a language model to produce more accurate and context-aware responses.
The HyPE approach enhances RAG by using hypothetical questions to create richer embeddings that capture potential user queries, improving retrieval precision.

This POC demonstrates chunking documents, generating hypothetical questions using OpenAI's GPT, embedding those questions with sentence-transformers, indexing with FAISS, and retrieving relevant chunks for user queries.
